Bottom-right fascicle signature reads 'Disp. 1' (abbreviation of Dispensa). Neither candidate ('Diip.' nor 'DUp.') matches; both are OCR garblings of 'Disp.'.
Left col p.9, line 'il cielo profondamente azzurro e l'aria bal-'. First letter clearly an open 'c'; published 'nielo' is an OCR c->n misread.
Right col p.9, 'smeraldo, aggrédiva con voli fulminei'. Printed with acute accent on e; matches witness 'aggrediva', not published 'aggradiva'.
Right col p.12, line-broken 'sono er-/mai,'. The broken char shows an 'e' crossbar (not closed 'o'), giving 'ermai,' as published; not the witness 'ormai'.
Left col bottom p.9, 'tenace, acettano come verità'. Single c printed; published 'accettano' is a normalization.
Right col p.10, 'un mazzo di a-/marillis.' continuation reads 'marillis' (single-l? no: m-a-r-i-l-l-i-s) i.e. amarillis with i, not y.
Right col p.11, 'le sarebbero riescite fatali'. Archaic 'riescite' printed; published 'riuscite' is modernized.
Right col p.11, 'avviarlo alla carriere militare'. Ends in -e on the page; published 'carriera' is wrong.
Right col p.12, 'il mazzo di amarillis che ros-/seggiava'. Printed with i (amarillis), not y.
Right col p.13, 'La buona signora, celiando, finì'. Clear 'celiando' with i; published 'celando' is wrong.
Left col top p.14, 'un tempio inalzato, nella notte dei secoli'. Single n printed; published 'innalzato' is normalized.
